summary: Sprint 6C Cursor-Based Pagination Testing Complete - All 5 endpoints verified for keyset pagination. 17/17 tests passed. Regression suite: 428 passed, 0 failed, 13 skipped.

/app/backend/utils/pagination.py (added error handling for invalid cursor - returns HTTP 400 instead of 500)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 6C cursor-based pagination fully tested. All 5 endpoints (tickets, invoices-enhanced, hr/employees, efi/failure-cards, journal-entries) support both legacy page/limit and cursor params. Cursor format is base64-encoded JSON {v: sort_value, t: tiebreaker_id}. Regression suite at 428 passed. Note: /api/v1/efi/failure-cards requires efi_failure_intelligence feature flag.
